calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar May-08-2026 Discharged
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for an Order of Examination as to Judgment Debtor

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505; Matter not reported

Judgment Creditor U.S. Bancorp Investments, Inc. is not present
Judgment Debtor Thomas Bradford Bennett is present.

As there is not appearance by the Judgment Creditor, this matter is discharged.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Mar-27-2026 Continued For Letter To May-08-26 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for an Order of Examination as to Judgment Debtor Thomas Bradford Bennett

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505; Matter not reported

Judgment Creditor U.S. Bancorp is present represented by Lisa Meier, Esq.
Judgment Debtor Thomas Bradford Bennett is not present.

A Bench Letter was issued and set for May 8, 2026 at 11:00am in department 505.

Mr. Bennett appeared at 12:00pm and stated he was in the hallway waiting to be called on this matter. He was handed the Bench Letter and instructed to appear on May 8, 2026 to complete the exmaniation.

All financial documents and flash drives this department has received through mail and drop box on this matter were handed to Ms. Meier in court.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Dec-19-2025 Continued To Mar-27-26 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for an Order of Examination as to Judgment Debtor Thomas Bradford Bennett

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505; Matter not reported

Judgment Creditor U.S. Bancorp Investments, Inc. is present represented by Roger Jackson.
Judgment Debtor Thomas Bradford Bennett is present.

The court received subpoenaed docments on ths matter from American Express Corporation. They were given to Mr. Jackson.

Mr. Bennett is sworn. Order of Examination is started. Parties stipulate to a continuance of this matter for further examination. Both parties agreed to return on March 27, 2026 at 11:00am in dept. 505 for further examination.

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-18-2024 Off Calendar

U.S. Bancorp Investments, Inc.'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-26-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JOHN D. ELLIS, Esq. of Sheppard, Mullin, Richter & Hampton LLP (Tel: 415-434-9100) for petitioner U.S. Bancorp Investments, Inc.;
No appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER U.S. BANCORP INVESTMENTS, INC.'s Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. U.S. Bancorp Investments, Inc.'s unopposed petition to confirm arbitration award is granted.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
